attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; instead positions for punchy sprint finishes on transition/rolling terrain. Excels in explosive kick-sprints after selective climbing pace, unsuited to pure flat sprints.
team_tactics: Operates as both leadout rider for teammates (MAJKA, BENNETT) and as protected finisher himself. Team struggles when attempting late infiltration of established trains rather than early positioning.
terrain_preference: Rolling/transition finishes where climbing pace eliminates pure sprinters but allows explosive finish. Technical flat finishes expose significant positioning vulnerabilities.
vulnerability: Chronic crashes in technical finales when contesting position (kerb impacts Catalunya 2019 x2, Liège wet conditions). Late positioning battles consistently result in incidents or energy waste.
key_patterns: Won and placed on transition stages via explosive kick-sprint after selective pace (2018 Basque, Catalunya).
Crashed into kerbs/barriers in technical positioning moments across multiple 2019 races (Catalunya x2, Liège).
Functions dual role: GC domestique positioning work and own finish opportunities on selective stages.
Team leadout efforts collapse when infiltrating established trains late rather than positioning early (Catalunya 2018).
form_trajectory: negative: 2018 showed winning punch-sprint capability, but 2019-2020 dominated by crash incidents and domestique duties without personal results
